qualification.education_qualification: MCom or MBA with Finance with at least 55 per cent or an equivalent grade in a point scale. Minimum 2-3 years of work experience in the field of Finance and Accounts.
qualification.details: Qualification: MCom or MBA with Finance with at least 55 per cent or an equivalent grade in a point scale. Experience: Minimum 2-3 years of work experience in the field of Finance and Accounts.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TISS Accounts Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Accounts Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the TISS Accounts Assistant position is July 5, 2026. Ensure all details are submitted accurately before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Accounts Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MCom or MBA with Finance degree, achieving at least 55% marks or an equivalent grade. Relevant work experience is also a key requirement.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Accounts Assistant role is 35 years. There are no specified minimum age limits mentioned.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the TISS Accounts Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the TISS Accounts Assistant positions. This makes the application process more accessible.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Accounts Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Accounts Assistant post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 26,000, which includes a travelling allowance as part of the compensation package.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Accounts Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Accounts Assistant position in the Tata Institute of Social Sciences recruitment drive. This is a single opening for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the TISS Accounts Assistant recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website or the provided link to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job? Is it permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: The Accounts Assistant position is offered on a contract basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed duration as specified by the Tata Institute of Social Sciences.

faq.question: Q9. What are the selection criteria for the Accounts Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Accounts Assistant role involves a Personal Interaction followed by Document Verification. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for the TISS Accounts Assistant recruitment can be accessed through the "Important Links" section provided in this article. It contains all detailed information.
